jobs.note: ONE call only — 4 panels inside, then excalibur_blog_cover_quad_split.py

mcp_args.prompt:
Russian human-made hook collage, zine/trash-design DIY aesthetic adapted to 16:9 widescreen, torn paper strips, scotch tape, pink sticky notes, marker handwriting, highlighter pink brush on key Cyrillic words, fake phone screenshots (Wordstat, reviews, Telegram chat, analytics), meme reaction cutouts with rough edges, grunge paper texture background #F5F5F0, bold condensed Cyrillic headlines, layered scraps NOT corporate banner,
Single canvas 2048x1152 pixels, exact 2x2 grid, four equal 16:9 panels (1024x576 each). Optional thin white gutters ONLY on the exact center lines (x=1024 and y=576); keep all panel content strictly inside its quadrant — no bleed across seams.
REFERENCE FACE (top-left cover ONLY): preserve EXACT likeness from input reference photo —
Blog host on COVER ONLY: preserve EXACT face likeness from reference — bright blue eyes, short dark brown hair, clean-shaven, no glasses. Skin: clean even tone, subtle professional retouch, natural studio lighting, no blemishes or harsh grain. Expression: warm friendly smile, approachable expert — NOT neutral serious portrait from reference. Pose reacts to article topic: point at key chart, graph, funnel, dashboard, table or highlighted number on the collage when it makes the hook clearer; eye contact with camera OR directed gaze at the UI element. Outfit, props: agent's creative choice for the meme hook — do NOT copy reference photo clothing unless scene_hint asks.
Свободный выбор агента: костюм, casual, мем-костюм, реквизит — по cover_hook и scene_hint. Reference photo outfit is NOT mandatory.
Top-left COVER — hook "Один AI Agent захлебнулся в 10 tools? Собери orchestrator + 3 specialists":
16:9 hook collage panel: blog host cutout (reference face, agent-chosen outfit), layered fake screenshots (Wordstat keys, zero reads analytics, 5-star review snippet or Telegram «где трафик?»), torn paper + tape + pink sticky note, 1-2 different meme reaction faces, huge Cyrillic hook headline with pink highlight on key word, handwritten arrow, DIY human-made zine aesthetic NOT corporate ad
reference-лицо, тёмный худи с оранжевым акцентом n8n, жест указывает на fake n8n canvas с 10 tools на одной ноде и красным «ERROR». Рядом fake Wordstat «n8n агенты 699», Telegram «бот тупит на CRM», torn paper + pink sticky «orchestrator спасёт». Мем facepalm + shocked cat. Розовый маркер на слове «orchestrator».
Cyrillic meme caption: "10 tools — 0 делегаций?".
Different meme reactions than inline panels. Fake screenshots encouraged.
Top-right — [Чеклист / printable board] Russian blog printable checklist board illustration, clipboard or kanban card layout, checkboxes and short Cyrillic items, editorial clean design, 16:9, H2: «Проверьте, когда одного AI Agent мало». Чеклист на доске: 3 сценария «нужен multi-agent» (смешанные системы, разные модели, Reflexion) vs anti-pattern «MAS вместо RAG». Без лица героя. Pink sticky «5 диалогов — выпиши системы». Tape corner. feels like real pre-publish checklist photo/screenshot on clipboard with red pen marks and tape, no meme character NO blog host face. Add subtle human-made layer: small sticky note, tape corner, or mini screenshot inset — still readable utility UI/diagram underneath Negative: meme, impact font joke, watermark, English text, cartoon host
Bottom-left — [Сравнительная таблица / UI-мокап] Professional Russian blog editorial UI mockup, clean SaaS dashboard aesthetic, light background #FAFAF7, accent #E85D4C, readable Cyrillic labels, 16:9 widescreen screenshot style, H2: «Выберите паттерн оркестрации под ваш кейс». UI-таблица 4 паттерна: Supervisor, Router, Pipeline, Reflexion — колонки «Когда» и «Ноды n8n». Highlight Router + Switch. Без героя. Mini n8n node icons, marker arrow «ticket type → Router». looks like a helpful pasted screenshot with pink sticky note corner and scotch tape, human-made Notion/Google Sheets vibe, subtle shadow, high detail Cyrillic UI, no host face NO blog host face. Add subtle human-made layer: small sticky note, tape corner, or mini screenshot inset — still readable utility UI/diagram underneath Negative: meme impact font, cartoon mascot, watermark, English UI labels, blurry text
Bottom-right — [Схема workflow / шаги] Clean Russian infographic workflow diagram, numbered steps connected by arrows, editorial blog style, colors #FAFAF7 #1A1A2E #E85D4C #FFD93D, 16:9, H2: «Соберите orchestrator и sub-agents пошагово». Workflow-схема: Chat Trigger → Orchestrator AI Agent → AI Agent Tool (A|B|C) + Call n8n Workflow Tool → IF quality → Human approval. 8 numbered steps sticker. Без лица. n8n canvas aesthetic, coral arrows. readable Cyrillic step titles on torn-paper workflow strip, marker arrows, taped checklist scrap, practical how-to, no meme faces NO blog host face. Add subtle human-made layer: small sticky note, tape corner, or mini screenshot inset — still readable utility UI/diagram underneath Negative: meme, face closeup, watermark, chaotic collage, English text
single canvas 2048x1152 pixels, exact 2x2 grid, four equal 16:9 panels (1024x576 each), thin white gutters, high detail collage illustration, each panel feels like a human editor pasted screenshots and memes
Inline panels (top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right): editorial UI/diagram only — NO host face on those three panels.
Negative: English text, Latin UI, watermark, logo, generic stock photo, boring corporate infographic, vertical carousel 9:16, instagram story, polished ad, same meme 4 times, unreadable gibberish text, extra fingers, vertical carousel 9:16, instagram story layout, corporate stock banner, clean minimal SaaS only, English text, watermark, same meme repeated 4 times, polished ad look, extra faces on inline panels
